narrative_beat: Close macro extremo de ampulheta dourada sobre pergaminho, ultimos graos de areia caindo

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: an aged golden hourglass resting on a weathered parchment, almost all sand collected at the bottom
subject.focal_point: the last few grains of sand falling through the narrow center
subject.secondary: amber glass reflections, tiny scratches on gold frame, aged parchment fibers

environment.location: pitch black space, single object on parchment

composition.foreground: falling sand grains in sharp focus, warm amber-gold
composition.midground: hourglass and parchment in rich tones

lighting.key_light: hard side raking light from left casting dramatic shadow
lighting.rim_light: gold rim on hourglass glass curvature

style.post_processing: halation on sand highlights, crushed blacks, heavy grain, amber-gold saturation only
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, glass micro-scratches, sand granularity, parchment texture

symbolism.primary: time running out before the imminent return
symbolism.secondary: the when is uncertain, the if is not

negative_as_positive: clean frame without text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
pitch black background palette, warm amber saturated object only
tack-sharp focus on falling sand grains

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.

narration_excerpt: A proximidade e real. A imprecisao e sobre o quando. Nao sobre o se.
